mnemonics: F.E.A.T. for Requirement Modeling: Flowcharts, ERDs, Agile User Stories, Traceability Matrices
keyPoints: Use Case Modeling describes interactions between actors and the system to achieve goals.
Data Modeling (like ERDs) defines the data objects and their relationships.
Behavioral Modeling (like State Diagrams) shows how the system responds to events.
commonMistakes: Focusing only on functional requirements while ignoring non-functional ones (e.g., performance, security).
Creating overly complex models that are difficult for stakeholders to understand and validate.
